title: Red Hat Security Advisory: Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 Security Update
overview: New Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 packages are available from the Customer Portal
description: New Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 packages are available from the Customer Portal
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 Security Update

New Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 packages are available from the Customer Portal

New Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 packages are available from the Customer Portal



CVE-2025-13467: A flaw was found in the Keycloak LDAP User Federation provider. This vulnerability allows an authenticated realm administrator to trigger deserialization of untrusted Java objects via a malicious LDAP server configuration.
